top.name: Worldshaper
top.rules_text: Imbue all tiles within 3 with your highest attunement element. Deal 3 damage per tile imbued.

bottom.name: Elemental Read
bottom.rules_text: Draw 1 card. Gain 1 mana for each unique element imbued on tiles within 3.

upgrades.description: Worldshaper deals more damage per tile. Elemental Read draws 2.

changes.value: Imbue all tiles within 3 with your highest element. Deal 4 damage per tile.
Draw 2 cards. Gain 1 mana per unique element on nearby tiles.

upgrades.description: Architect: Worldshaper imbues with the top two attunement elements.

changes.value: Imbue all tiles within 3 with your top 2 attunement elements. Deal 4 damage per tile.

upgrades.description: Oracle: Elemental Read also scries — look at top 2 cards of deck and reorder.

changes.value: Draw 2. Gain mana per nearby element. Scry top 2 cards.

upgrades.description: Grand Design: The radius grows to 4 and enemies on imbued tiles are slowed.

changes.value: Imbue all tiles within 4 with top 2 elements. Deal 4 damage per tile. Enemies on imbued tiles slowed.

upgrades.description: Elemental Sight: Gain bonus attunement stacks per unique element present in the area.

changes.value: Draw 2. Gain mana per nearby element. Gain attunement per unique nearby element. Scry 2.

upgrades.description: World's Edge: The worldshaping becomes total — imbue with all four elements simultaneously.

changes.value: Imbue all tiles within 5 with all 4 elements. Deal 5 damage per tile. Enemies on imbued tiles slowed.

upgrades.description: Grand Confluence: The read becomes mastery — massive card advantage and attunement boost.

changes.value: Draw 3. Gain mana per nearby element (radius 4). Gain attunement per element. Scry 3.
